== Notes for [[Item:Q100313|Q100313]] ==

Mann (Text and Studies, I: 220 n. 43; 252-3 n. 14) convincingly argues that this Gaon is actually the one being referred to in the letters of R. Shmuel b. Eli (Assaf, p. 67). Brendan Goldman argues that the yeshiva was eclipsed by the creation of the office of the Nagid by Al-Afdal in 1193, appointing Ovadiah b. Ullah as Nagid Eretz Yisrael v’Yehudah (Brendan, dissertation, pp. 272-277). The Nagid’s letter of appointment is found in T-S Ar. 38.93.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD880C3D1EFBBFA9822EF79916C35AE
geni:6000000175159643137

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
